subcodes.first_line: ...Thou hast written of a verse in the Gospels, asking if at the time of Christ all souls did hear His call
subcodes.first_line_orig: در خصوص آيه انجيل مرقوم نموده بودی که از قرائن واضح ميشود که در يوم ظهور مسيح جميع نفوس استماع
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @many are called but few are chosen, @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
